Unbeatable security meets timeless design—protect what matters most with our premium main door locks.

Maximum protection with advanced anti-theft technology for your peace of mind.

FARA Main Door Lock

Durable and elegant security solution designed to withstand the toughest conditions.

Secure your entrance with style using our heavy-duty Starlife series.

Engineered for strength, providing a solid barrier against unauthorized access.

The perfect blend of modern design and uncompromising security for your home.

Home Guard Handle Lock

IHS Handle Lock

Precision-crafted handles for smooth operation and long-lasting durability.

King-AM Handle Lock

Regal design meets robust engineering for superior interior security.

MK-KFV Handle Lock

Modern aesthetics paired with a high-security mechanism for your modern lifestyle.

IMT Handle Lock

Reliable and consistent performance with a sleek design for every room.

PPRC Pipes & Fittings

Durable PPRC solutions — product names & sizes

PPRC Pipe

Sizes: 25mm, 32mm, 40mm, 50mm, 63mm, 75mm, 90mm, 110mm

Socket

Sizes: 25mm, 32mm, 40mm, 50mm, 63mm, 75mm, 90mm

Elbow 90°

Sizes: 25mm, 32mm, 40mm, 50mm, 63mm, 75mm, 90mm, 110mm

Elbow 45°

Sizes: 25mm, 32mm, 40mm

Tee

Sizes: 25mm, 32mm, 40mm, 50mm, 63mm, 75mm, 90mm, 110mm

Female Threaded Socket

Common sizes: 25x1/2", 25x3/4", 32x1/2", 32x3/4", 32x1", 40x1"...

Male Threaded Elbow / Tee

Multiple sizes for plumbing connections.

Reducing Socket / Elbow / Tee

Examples: 25x32mm, 32x40mm, 25x50mm etc.

Gate Valve

Sizes: 25mm, 32mm, 40mm, 50mm

End Cap / Plug

Sizes: 25mm, 32mm, 40mm, 50mm, 63mm

Clamp / Union / Over Cross

Clamps: 32mm, 40mm · Union: 25mm · Over Cross: 25mm, 32mm

Welding Heater

Sizes: 25-32mm, 25-63mm (socket heater types)

Socket

TEE

About Akbar Sanitary Store

Legacy of Trust Since 1994

For over three decades, we have been the cornerstone of quality sanitary solutions in Lahore. Our commitment to excellence has made us a household name.

Our Mission

To provide homeowners and builders with premium, durable, and aesthetically pleasing sanitary ware that enhances their living spaces while ensuring long-term reliability.

Our Commitment

We source only from authorized distributors of top-tier brands like Dura, Popular, and Turk Plast. Quality is not just a promise; it's our heritage.

Authorized Dealer
30+ Years Exp
Premium Brands
Expert Advice

Frequently Asked Questions

What materials are your faucets made of?
Our faucets are made from high-grade brass with a premium chrome finish. This ensures durability, resistance to rust and corrosion, and a long-lasting shine.
Do your products come with a warranty?
Yes, all our products come with a warranty or guarantee, but the duration depends on the product type and material. Please note that ceramic products do not come with any warranty or guarantee.
What payment methods do you accept?
We accept various payment methods, including credit cards, jazzcash, easypaisa, sadapay, and bank transfers.
How do I contact customer service?
You can contact our customer service team through phone, email, or our website's contact form.
What products do you offer?
We offer a range of sanitary products, including those from reputable brands like Popular, Dura, IIL, Turkplast and also GI(HE) fittings.
Are your products of high quality?
Yes, we prioritize quality and source products from trusted manufacturers like Dura, Popular and Turkplast.
Can I trust the authenticity of your products?
Absolutely! We only deal in genuine products from authorized distributors.
What brands do you partner with?
We partner with renowned brands like Dura, Popular, IIL, GI(HE) and Turkplast, ensuring high-quality products for our customers.
Do you have any certifications from Dura, Popular, and Turkplast?
Yes, we hold certificates from these reputable companies, confirming authorization to distribute their products.
What does the certification from Dura, Popular, and Turkplast mean?
It means we've met their standards for quality, reliability, and business practices, ensuring our customers receive authentic products.
Is your sanitary business registered with the government?
Yes, our business is fully registered and compliant with all relevant government regulations.
Can I see your certificates?
Yes, we can provide documentation upon request, showcasing our certification with these brands.
How does this certification benefit customers?
It guarantees product authenticity, quality, and reliability, giving customers peace of mind when purchasing from us.
Are you an authorized distributor for these brands?
Yes, our certification confirms our authorized status.
What areas do you serve?
We serve in all over Lahore but mostly in areas like Defence, Model town, Johar town, Bahria town, Central Park and many more.
How do I schedule a service appointment?
You can schedule an appointment by calling us at [03211306560, 03214715974, 03211106560] or through our website.
Do you offer emergency plumbing services?
Yes, we offer emergency plumbing services for urgent issues.
What types of sanitary fittings do you install?
We install a wide range of sanitary fittings, including toilets, sinks, showers, and more.
Do you provide warranties on your work?
Yes, we provide warranties on our work and products.
How can I get a quote for my project?
You can get a quote by contacting us through our website or giving us a call.

Privacy Policy

1. Introduction

Welcome to Akbar Sanitary Store. We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or visit our showroom.

2. Information We Collect

We may collect personal information such as your name, contact number, and address when you make an inquiry via our contact form or WhatsApp. This information is used solely to provide you with the services and products you request.

3. Use of Information

Your information is used for processing orders, responding to inquiries, and improving our customer service. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

Terms & Conditions

1. General

By accessing this website, you agree to comply with and be bound by these terms and conditions. The content of this website is for your general information and use only.

2. Product Accuracy

While we strive for accuracy, product specifications and availability may change without notice. Images are for illustrative purposes; the actual product may vary slightly in appearance.

3. Pricing

Prices are subject to change due to market conditions. For the most accurate and up-to-date pricing, please contact us directly via the provided phone numbers or visit our store.

Exchange & Return

1. Exchange Policy

Items can be exchanged within 7 days of purchase, provided they are in their original packaging, unused, and accompanied by the original receipt.

2. Non-Returnable Items

Custom-ordered items, broken tiles, or items that have been installed are not eligible for exchange or return. Please inspect all goods upon delivery.

3. Return Process

To initiate a return or exchange, please visit our showroom on Ghazi Road with the product and proof of purchase. Final decision on returns rests with the store management.

Refund Policy

1. Eligibility

Refunds are only processed if a product is found to have a manufacturing defect and cannot be replaced with a similar item. Change of mind is not applicable for refunds.

2. Process

Refunds will be processed through the original method of payment or store credit, depending on the situation, within 5-7 working days after approval.

Cancellation Policy

1. Order Cancellation

Orders can be canceled within 24 hours of placement or before they are dispatched for delivery. Once the items have left our warehouse, cancellation is not possible.

2. Advance Payments

Advance payments for special bookings or custom orders are non-refundable in case of cancellation by the customer.

Akbar & Sons Sanitary Store

The leading supplier of premium sanitary ware and plumbing solutions since 1994. Quality you can build on.
